.file-embed.background: rgb(240, 234, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(201, 84, 84, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(240, 234, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(201, 84, 84, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgb(240, 234, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--font-headings:
"Source Serif Pro", "Source Serif 4", "Source Serif",
		"Rockwell", "New York", serif

div.inline-title::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(240, 234, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(240, 234, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(201, 84, 84, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(240, 234, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].font-family: "Source Serif Pro", "Source Serif 4", "Source Serif", Rockwell, "New York", serif

html.--font-headings:
"Source Serif Pro", "Source Serif 4", "Source Serif",
		"Rockwell", "New York", serif

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(201, 84, 84) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(248, 245, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(243, 225, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(248, 245, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(248, 245, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(248, 245, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
